Klein Moretti.eye_color: pitch black (deepened from dark brown to complete darkness)
Klein Moretti.primary_clothing: linen shirt, matching brown coat, round felt hat, old leather shoes
Klein Moretti.face_description: average-looking features with a rather deep outline; distinct scholarly air; temples show grotesque wound with burn marks in chapter opening scene
Klein Moretti.visual_anchor: early 20s male, brown eyes that turn deep black during divination, holding a silver-inlaid black cane
Klein Moretti.distinguishing_features: graduated from Khoy University; commoner background; four black dots forming a square appeared briefly on the back of his hand after the ritual
Klein Moretti.accessories: silver chain with a topaz hanging (worn under his left sleeve)
Klein Moretti.faction: citizen of Loen Kingdom, Awwa County, City of Tingen; history graduate of Khoy University
Klein Moretti.source_notes: Text explicitly states he has a silver chain with a topaz hanging under his left sleeve.
Klein Moretti.era_clothing_lock: black tuxedo over a white shirt and black vest, paired with trousers, boots, a bow tie, and a silk top hat

Old Neil.hair_style: white hair, likely short or medium as it fits under a felt hat
Old Neil.primary_clothing: Classic robe or suit, topped with a round felt hat.
Old Neil.visual_anchor: elderly male, frail build, thinning white hair, wrinkled pale face, wearing worn Victorian clothing, surrounded by documents
Old Neil.distinguishing_features: accompanied by a translucent pair of cold, ruthless, browless eyes floating in the void behind him
Old Neil.accessories: silver chain with a moonstone worn around the left wrist, gold pocket watch
Old Neil.role: civilian clerk in armory, former formal Nighthawk member
Old Neil.source_notes: Text explicitly states he has 'slightly turbid dark red eyes', removes a 'silver chain around his wrist' (left hand) with a moonstone, and uses a 'gold pocket watch'.

Mrs. Orianna.face_description: Refined and elegant face, clear and smiling eyes.
Mrs. Orianna.visual_anchor: 30s female, fair skin, black fashionable curly hair, clear green eyes, wearing a flounce lace dress.
Mrs. Orianna.source_notes: Described directly when Klein meets her in her office.

Dunn Smith.primary_clothing: white shirt, black vest, black trench coat, hat
Dunn Smith.face_description: Deep gaze, occasionally shows a slight hook at the corners of his lips when showing amusement
Dunn Smith.visual_anchor: mid-aged pale male with slightly high hairline and deep gray eyes, always wearing a black top hat and black knee-length Victorian trench coat, carries a tobacco pipe — codename Nighthawk, Church of Evernight dream-walker
Dunn Smith.distinguishing_features: gray eyes described as deep and hidden in shadow; leads the Nighthawks; references Mandated Punishers, Machinery Hivemind, and other Judiciaries as peer organizations
Dunn Smith.faction: Church of Evernight — Nighthawk Beyonder team
Dunn Smith.source_notes: Text explicitly mentions him picking up his halved top hat and his deep gray eyes.
Dunn Smith.era_clothing_lock: black trench coat and halved top hat

Leonard Mitchell.face_description: handsome with the romantic vibe of a poet
Leonard Mitchell.visual_anchor: Early 20s male, black hair, green eyes, untucked white shirt with a black vest draped casually, poetic but unrestrained demeanor
Leonard Mitchell.distinguishing_features: high spiritual perceptivity; magnetic and deep voice; recites poetry in a serene and melancholic manner
Leonard Mitchell.era_clothing_lock: untucked white collared shirt, dark wool trousers, unruly and informal appearance

Roselle Gustav.face_description: handsome and charismatic face with an air of authority
Roselle Gustav.visual_anchor: middle-aged male, elaborate emperor attire, charismatic and authoritative presence
Roselle Gustav.color_palette: imperial red, gold, white, navy blue
Roselle Gustav.distinguishing_features: Wrote his secret diary using simplified Chinese characters; created secret cards hiding the twenty-two paths of the divine
Roselle Gustav.faction: Emperor; creator of the Blasphemy Slate-derived 22-card system and the tarot cards as a gaming cover
Roselle Gustav.role: historical figure — Intis Republic's Consul, later self-proclaimed Emperor Caesar; inventor of the steam engine, tarot divination, and contemporary card game systems; recognized by the God of Craftsmanship; assassinated in year 1198 of the Fifth Epoch at the White Maple Palace by combined forces of the Church of the Eternal Blazing Sun, the Sauron family (former Intis royal family), and aristocrats
Roselle Gustav.source_notes: Klein recognizes the diary symbols as simplified Chinese characters; Audrey mentions the secret cards.

Bredt.primary_clothing: Black top hat, charcoal grey Victorian civilian suit, white shirt, and a dark cravat
Bredt.face_description: A mature and friendly face defined by a thick, bushy black beard and slightly weathered features.
Bredt.visual_anchor: Mid-40s male, thick black beard, wearing a black top hat and a charcoal Victorian civilian suit.
Bredt.color_palette: deep black, charcoal grey, snow white, dark brown
Bredt.source_notes: Described as a top hat-wearing middle-aged man with a thick black beard.

Rozanne.hair_style: long brown hair (implied by girl description)
Rozanne.visual_anchor: Early 20s female, brown hair, light-brown eyes, bright forehead, wearing a light green Loen-style dress with white lace details.
Rozanne.color_palette: light green, brown, white, soft cream
Rozanne.source_notes: Explicitly described as brown-haired and wearing a casual cream-colored dress.
Rozanne.era_clothing_lock: light green Victorian-style dress accentuated with beautiful lace on the sleeves, collar, and chest

Cesare Francis.primary_clothing: dark brown Victorian coachman's coat, flat cap, heavy boots
Cesare Francis.face_description: Weather-beaten face with a thick neck and a sturdy jawline. Professional and unassuming expression.
Cesare Francis.visual_anchor: mid-40s male, medium skin, short brown hair, wearing a dark brown Victorian coachman's coat and flat cap, holding carriage reins
Cesare Francis.color_palette: dark brown, charcoal grey, earthy tan
Cesare Francis.source_notes: Identified as the carriage driver for the company; appearance and age guessed based on profession.

Welch McGovern.primary_clothing: Expensive Victorian gentleman suit, pale blue waistcoat, white cravat, gold watch chain
Welch McGovern.face_description: Soft features of a wealthy youth, rounded chin, bright curious eyes, friendly expression
Welch McGovern.visual_anchor: early 20s male, fair skin, light brown hair, blue eyes, wearing an expensive pale blue Victorian waistcoat and a gold watch chain
Welch McGovern.distinguishing_features: acquired a notebook from the Fourth Epoch; generous personality; recruited Klein and Naya to help decode it
Welch McGovern.accessories: Gold pocket watch, leather-bound ancient notebook
Welch McGovern.faction: son of a banker from Constant City, Midseashire, Loen Kingdom
Welch McGovern.source_notes: Chapter 9 text: 'He was the son of a banker from Constant City, Midseashire, Loen Kingdom' stated explicitly; his role in obtaining the Fourth Epoch notebook confirmed

Audrey Hall.age_range: teenager — confirmed not yet eighteen at time of chapter
Audrey Hall.primary_clothing: collared, high-waisted, pale-white dress with engageantes, tight corset, voluminous cage crinoline; white-silk gloves; white dancing shoes with roses and diamonds.
Audrey Hall.face_description: delicate and youthful features, a soft jawline, and large expressive eyes
Audrey Hall.visual_anchor: late teens female, fair skin, long blonde hair, wearing a luxurious Victorian aristocratic dress, holding a cracked bronze mirror
Audrey Hall.distinguishing_features: virid eyes that sparkle with an abnormal radiance; expressive and animated
Audrey Hall.faction: Tarot Club (Justice); noble class resident of Backlund, Empress Borough
Audrey Hall.role: founding member of the Tarot Club, code name Justice

Susie.face_description: Friendly and remarkably intelligent golden retriever face, featuring a soft muzzle and expressive, bright eyes.
Susie.visual_anchor: Intelligent golden retriever dog with lustrous golden fur and bright brown eyes, often sitting with an air of capable assistance.
Susie.color_palette: golden yellow, warm brown, creamy white
Susie.source_notes: Referred to explicitly as a golden retriever.

Annie.primary_clothing: Traditional black Victorian maidservant dress with a crisp white apron and cap
Annie.face_description: Efficient and professional expression, tidy features, and a disciplined posture.
Annie.visual_anchor: Mid-30s female, fair skin, brown hair in a neat bun, wearing a black Victorian maidservant dress with a white apron.
Annie.source_notes: Audrey's maidservant; age and hair color inferred from her senior role.

Duchess Della.primary_clothing: Luxurious emerald green silk Victorian gown with black lace trim and a wide-brimmed feathered hat.
Duchess Della.face_description: Elegant and refined features, high cheekbones, thin arching brows, and a poised, aristocratic air.
Duchess Della.visual_anchor: early 40s female, fair skin, dark brown hair in an updo, wearing a luxurious emerald green silk Victorian gown and a feathered hat
Duchess Della.accessories: pure ocean-blue sapphire (ring or jewelry piece).
Duchess Della.source_notes: Seen at the banquet showing off her sapphire.

Madam Vivi.primary_clothing: Crisp white baker's apron over a simple grey Victorian dress, sleeves rolled up.
Madam Vivi.face_description: Warm, round face with gentle wrinkles around the eyes and a capable, professional expression.
Madam Vivi.visual_anchor: 50s female, fair skin, salt and pepper hair in a bun, wearing a white baker's apron over a grey Victorian dress
Madam Vivi.color_palette: stark white, slate grey, flour dust beige
Madam Vivi.source_notes: Mentioned as a palace baker; appearance and age guessed based on profession.

Alger Wilson.primary_clothing: robe with lightning patterns embroidered on it
Alger Wilson.visual_anchor: early 30s male, weathered skin, dark messy hair, wearing a robe embroidered with lightning patterns, holding a quirky-shaped glass bottle
Alger Wilson.color_palette: deep sea blue, silver, dark grey
Alger Wilson.distinguishing_features: unusually dark-blue hair, messy and unkempt
Alger Wilson.accessories: quirky-shaped glass bottle containing supernatural substances — bubbles, frost/snow, and gusting wind visible inside at different moments
Alger Wilson.source_notes: Described with a stoic expression on his rough face, and as the captain of the Blue Avenger.
Alger Wilson.era_clothing_lock: robe embroidered with lightning patterns, worn aboard a three-masted sailboat at sea

Sainz.face_description: Clean-cut features with a determined brow and sharp blue eyes that suggest religious fervor.
Sainz.visual_anchor: mid-30s male, pale skin, short blond hair, wearing a dark blue robe with silver lightning patterns, right fist clenched against his chest in salute
Sainz.distinguishing_features: Lightning pattern embroidery on his robes.
Sainz.source_notes: Described as a blond man dressed in a robe with lightning patterns speaking to Alger.

Man in Halved Top Hat.unique_identifier: always wears a black top hat split in half (halved top hat)
Man in Halved Top Hat.era_clothing_lock: black formal Victorian suit, crisp white collared shirt, black cravat, dark trousers, and polished leather shoes
Man in Halved Top Hat.face_description: weathered angular face with tired eyes and hair graying at the temples
Man in Halved Top Hat.visual_anchor: lanky older male with hair graying at the sides and a weathered face, always wearing a halved black top hat and a black formal Victorian suit
Man in Halved Top Hat.color_palette: deep black, charcoal grey, pale ivory
Man in Halved Top Hat.distinguishing_features: sides of his hair have grayed
Man in Halved Top Hat.source_notes: Described entering the company as a lanky man with graying hair at the sides, wearing a drenched black formal suit and a halved top hat.
